actionable_feedback: Execute creep_fit_report.ipynb end-to-end and commit the generated artifacts (decision_table.csv, validation_plots.png, and any validation CSVs). Attach these files to the revised attempt so verifiers can confirm reproducibility.

Add explicit quantitative sensitivity analyses: (a) manufacturability mapping alternatives (at minimum: 70/30 (current), 50/50, and 100% density) showing updated total scores and final ranking, and (b) +/-10% cost perturbation table that shows how scores and ranking change for each option. Include the generated tables as part of decision_table.csv and display them in validation_plots.png.

Add minimal automated checks in the notebook (asserts or small unit checks) that confirm packet row values are loaded correctly (strength, density, cost) and that normalization formulas use the same min/max values as reported in output.txt. Log the assertions' pass/fail in the notebook output.

Ensure the final output artifact(s) are not truncated: include the full output.txt or split long outputs into separate attachments (e.g., decision_table.csv, sensitivity_tables.csv) so artifact previews include the numeric tables verifiers referenced.

Document the rationale for the chosen 70/30 manufacturability proxy (e.g., why density was weighted heavier) and include brief notes on when a different mapping might be more appropriate (e.g., known geometry, manufacturing constraints).

feedback_summary: Baseline deliverable (output.txt) is complete and numeric scoring/normalization is consistent and reproducible from the packet values. The grader and verifier verified arithmetic and rubric alignment and the deliverable correctly documents assumptions and limitations. Two verification gaps remain: (1) the referenced notebook (creep_fit_report.ipynb) was not executed and the artifact preview is truncated, limiting reproducibility and preventing confirmation of generated files (decision_table.csv, validation_plots.png); (2) the manufacturability sensitivity analysis and explicit +/-10% cost perturbation tables were described qualitatively but not provided numerically in the preview.

verifier_issues.summary: Artifact preview truncated and full notebook (creep_fit_report.ipynb) was not executed.
Manufacturability sensitivity analysis is qualitative in the preview; no explicit alternate mappings/sensitivity tables present.
